title: SWANLAKE16PCS 6" inch Spring Clamp, Heavy Duty Spring Metal Spring Clamps, 2.5"-inch Jaw Opening (16PCS)
features: 1.Heavy duty spring clamp is made of nickel-plated steel,is durable and anti-rust.
2.The length of each spring clamp is 6 inch,the maximum opening is 2.5inch
3.Coil spring with 4 loops make it stronger clamping force.
4.The non-slip plastic cover protects the tool surfaces.also match all uneven surfaces.
5.Suitable for carpentry,photography, home decoration or industrial production.
description: SWANLAKE16PCS 6" inch Spring Clamp, Heavy Duty Spring Metal Spring Clamps, 2.5"-inch Jaw opening
